---
title: "Pipeline architecture"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This page is a high-level narrative of the pipeline — what each stage does,
why it's shaped the way it is, and what files it reads and writes. For
operator-level detail (sizing, parallelism math, CRDS troubleshooting),
see `CLAUDE.md` in the repo. For the exact file-format schemas, see
`docs/data_model_reference.md`.
:::

## TODO

- Stage-by-stage description (reads/writes/why)
- Data flow diagram
- Config schema walkthrough
- Vendored `make_stack.py` + per-line seed post-processing — the two
  deliberate deviations from upstream romanisim
- CRDS hydration + verification design
- Parallelism choices (stage 02 / 04 / 05) + memory math
